seoTitle: How to Use Lucidchart in Google Docs Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to install the Lucidchart add-on in Google Docs to embed and sync flowcharts, diagrams, and mind maps directly in your document.
intro: Adding professional diagrams to a Google Doc doesn't have to mean exporting images from external design software. The Lucidchart add-on connects your Lucid account directly to Docs, letting you embed and refresh diagrams from inside the sidebar. This guide covers installing the add-on, connecting your account, and keeping embedded charts in sync.

steps.heading: Install the Lucidchart add-on
steps.body: Go to Extensions > Add-ons > Get add-ons, search for 'Lucidchart,' and click 'Install' on the verified application.

steps.heading: Connect your Lucid account
steps.body: Open the new Lucidchart icon in the sidebar, click 'Log in,' and authenticate your Lucid profile.

steps.heading: Browse and select a diagram
steps.body: Click 'Browse Documents' to view your saved charts, then choose the flowchart or diagram you want to embed.

steps.heading: Insert the diagram
steps.body: Select the specific page or frame you need and click 'Select' to place the image directly into your document.

steps.heading: Keep it updated
steps.body: After editing your diagram in Lucidchart, return to your document and click 'Update Images' to pull the latest version into your document.

faq.question: Do I need a paid Lucidchart account to use the add-on?
faq.answer: A free Lucidchart account works for basic diagrams, though advanced features may require a paid plan.

faq.question: Will embedded diagrams update automatically?
faq.answer: No, you need to click 'Update Images' after editing in Lucidchart to refresh the embedded version in your document.

faq.question: Can I resize the diagram once it's inserted?
faq.answer: Yes, you can click the image and drag its corner handles to resize it like any other embedded graphic.

faq.question: Is the Lucidchart add-on free to install?
faq.answer: Yes, installing the add-on itself is free, though your access to certain diagrams depends on your Lucidchart account plan.
